today.loggedSummary: Hyp A: Incline 135lb, Preacher 50lb, Pushdown 50lb, Crunch 65lb; T-run: 4×5 min @ 8:00/mi (Treadmill, lift-first).

keyTargets: Restore standard run AM/lift PM schedule (≥6h gap) to ensure accurate T-run RPE/HR signal.
Execute run-MHR retest (W5-W6) to validate true HR zones; ignore off-191 bpm bands for now.
Push soleus wall-sit duration toward 50-60s per session.
Bump cable lateral + preacher curl + triceps pushdown loads in next scheduled session.
warnings: Lift-first ordering today confounded RPE/HR signal for T-run; avoid back-to-back ordering.
HR data remains elevated vs. easy effort — monitor for potential over-reach.
Watch for signs of Accutane-related muscle fatigue or rhabdo-risk signs (dark urine, persistent soreness).
highlights: Incline BB working load 135lb (TM 165) successful start.
Cable crunch working load established at 65lb (pyramid testing).

cardio.notes: Lift-first ordering induced higher RPE/HR; restore AM-run/PM-lift sequence for future Tue.
